# Multitenancy and QoS

Inference platforms become hard when many users, models, and workloads share the
same capacity.

## Chapter Job

Explain fairness, isolation, scheduling, and degradation in multi-tenant
inference systems.

## Topics

- Tenant-aware queues.
- Priority classes.
- Rate limits.
- Admission control.
- Deadline-aware scheduling.
- Per-tenant cost attribution.
- Noisy-neighbor failures.
- Model pool isolation.
- Shared versus dedicated capacity.
- Graceful degradation.

## Artifact

Design a QoS policy for three tenants:

- Interactive product traffic.
- Internal batch jobs.
- Evaluation workloads.
